### [Undermining Our Friends; Rewarding Our Enemies](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-j/)
The anti-Trump pro-Biden mainstream press is breathlessly covering a second bogus impeachment this week. You can read here in this week's blog about something far more important. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-t/)
# Previous Blog Posts
[](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [It's Time for a Second Contract With America](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Democrats now control both Congress and the Presidency. Changing that sorry state of affairs will require dramatic action. In my opinion, a second Contract With America. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-h/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [Judge President Biden by his Actions, Not by his Words](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-u/)
Joe Biden preaches unity. His actions are far from it. Read about it in this week's blog. [Read this entry >>](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-o/) [](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [The Inaugural Address Joe Biden Should Give (But Probably Won't)](https://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-juukhdhy-kujkulhluu-n/)
At noon today, on the West front of the Capitol building, Joe Biden will be sworn in as the 46th President of the United States. I'll be there. Here's the speech he ought to give (but probably won't.) name: Unite the Country
subject: Our New Ad Celebrating Joe Biden Delivering for the American People
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/EA/EA005/1/78987/images/utc-web-logo.png]
Peter --
Today we are releasing a new ad featuring hip-hop artist Common that celebrates the many early accomplishments of President Biden's administration.
In the new ad, Common says: "In November, we voted for Joe Biden. We organized for economic justice, social justice, climate justice, and criminal justice reform. Over the last three weeks, Joe Biden began to deliver the change we demanded. And this is only a start. The real work begins now."

https://youtu.be/M9ItHM31l-c [https://youtu.be/M9ItHM31l-c]

Will you watch our new video and share it with your friends and followers on social media?

Watch + Share on Twitter [http://twitter.com/unitecountrypac]
Watch + Share on Facebook [http://facebook.com/unitethecountrypac]
Watch + Share on YouTube [https://youtu.be/fYCOaDOYV4U]

When we launched Unite the Country in 2019, we were committed to supporting Joe Biden -- and we're proud to continue that work by educating voters about the accomplishments of the Biden-Harris administration.

We'll keep fighting to push back against misinformation and working to inspire voters to stay engaged in the legislative and political fights ahead.

Onward,

Unite the Country

Unite the Country
1200 Pennsylvania Ave NW
Washington, DC 20044
United States

clean_body: New Hampshire can flip the U.S. Senate in 2022. Derek, In 2022, all eyes will be on New Hampshire: Control of the U.S. Senate is up for grabs right here in the Granite State. In that effort we have some good news: Saint Anselm just released a poll that shows only 39% of New Hampshire wants to reelect Maggie Hassan. What’s more is that 47% of New Hampshire voters are already looking to replace Senator Hassan with someone who will protect and defend the NH Advantage. As she continues to serve as the deciding vote in the U.S. Senate, expect that number to increase. Senator Maggie Hassan can decide to vote with the people of New Hampshire or she can vote in lockstep and join Vice President Kamala Harris in rubber stamping the Democrat's agenda. New Hampshire is one of our best shots at taking back control of the U.S. Senate in 2022 , but we need your help in order to do so. The 2022 U.S. Senate race in New Hampshire could be one of the most expensive in our nation's history and The path to a new Republican Majority in the Senate runs right through New Hampshire in 2022 -**** \- NHGOPChairman Stephen Stepanek SECURE DONOR BOX Derek, can we count on you to donate whatever you can today to help retire Maggie Hassan and flip the United States Senate to Republican control in 2022? | New Hampshire Republican State Committee 10 Water Street Concord New Hampshire 03301 |

name: Mike Thompson
subject: What this month means
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mike Thompson For Congress unsubscribe: https://email
body:
# [#]
Peter,

February is Black History Month, where we pay tribute to the history and achievements of Black Americans. It has never been more important to learn and reflect on the importance of Black history throughout our nation.

Our country has made tremendous progress in striving for equality — for the first time in our nation’s history we elected a Black woman Vice President of the United States. While there is much to celebrate this month, we still have a lot of work ahead of us to ensure equality for all.

If we stand together, I’m confident that our nation will move forward. This February, I want you to join me in remembering those who have shaped Black history and the important work they have done to better our nation.

Thank you,

Mike Thompson

Hi Peter,

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a conservative Christian combat vet [running to take back a Swing district](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hIk4cclG3L8vIic&b=71GkcJdmbDiEJQbhPX.jmg) \- Florida’s 9th District, currently held by embattled liberal Democrat Darren Soto.**

I nearly shocked the establishment by defeating this nutty Democrat in 2020, garnering more votes than any Republican ever had in this district. And I'm back to finish the job!

Looking at the crazy things Congress is doing right now, I can't help but think that the country may NEED a real patriot in there!

First, Pelosi strips the committee assignments from outstanding pro-Trump Congresswoman Marjorie Taylor Greene. Not for anything she did, but for things she said BEFORE she was in Congress.

It's a travesty and a direct violation of the First Amendment.

[ ](secure.anedot.com/william-olson-for-congress/st)
---

But the big thing that makes me angry is the sham impeachment of President Trump.

_Now, to me, he was really re-elected and SHOULD be in office now_. But given that he is not now in office, why the heck are they wasting time going after Trump? Only thing I can figure is Trump Derangement Syndrome- a bad case!

Now, Pelosi, I expect as much from her. She's been the Wicked Witch of the West for decades.

**But I want to get to Congress just so I can vote against that traitor Liz Cheney for GOP Leadership. **

_A day after being censured by her state’s Republican Party, Wyoming Rep. Liz Cheney, the third-ranking Republican in the House of Representatives, went on Fox News to defend her vote to impeach former President Donald Trump — and to argue that the GOP will have lost its way if it doesn’t reject Trump’s brand of politics._

_Cheney was one of just 10 House Republicans who joined Democrats in impeaching Trump for the charge of incitement of insurrection at the US Capitol in January. And she has been facing the consequences of that vote ever since._

_After Trump loyalists in the party called for her ouster from party leadership for turning against Trump, House Republicans held a secret ballot vote on Wednesday on whether she should retain her No. 3 position among her colleagues._

Liz Cheney is just as bad as Nancy Pelosi. They are both part of the problem- a Swamp that is corrupt and powerful and exists to subvert the rules to benefit the elites, and punish dissent.

[ ](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hIk4cclG3L8vIic&b=71GkcJdmbDiEJQbhPX.jmg)
---

We the People need to punish every single Swampy Congressman that voted to impeach Trump. Darren Soto did it twice- and I intend to punish him at the ballot box!

_I made him sweat last time, being outspent 7-1. Can you imagine what I can do after a SECOND vote to impeach- and with more time to fundraise?_

Darren Soto hates the President and does not vote in the interest of the people of Central Florida.

**I am an America First patriot, and I will vote with the Constitution!**

The Dems are running amok, lawless. I must hold them to account, can[ you help me?](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hIk4cclG3L8vIic&b=71GkcJdmbDiEJQbhPX.jmg)

[Can I count on you for a donation](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hIk4cclG3L8vIic&b=71GkcJdmbDiEJQbhPX.jmg) of $15, $35, $60, $250, $500, $1000.... all the way to the Federal maximum donation of $2900 per individual, $5800 per couple? Let's send the Swamp a message by taking out one of their own!

**I can beat them **- [with your help!](https://clicks.aweber.com/y/ct/?l=5m7pe&m=hIk4cclG3L8vIic&b=71GkcJdmbDiEJQbhPX.jmg)

_Let's get this done!_

Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter

| Dear Fellow American,

America is facing _a worsening crisis of uncontrolled illegal immigration_ from the dangerously **radical Biden Immigration Agenda!**
We've already seen a new border surge of illegal entries (from 17,000 last April to 70,000 in November) who understand that Joe Biden's Immigration Agenda is a more liberal, open-door approach to immigration law enforcement. But that's an understatement...
...the Biden Immigration Agenda is going to be bad for America and includes:

* Reversing most of the Trump immigration agenda from deportations to asylum policy, including defunding wall construction, expanding visas and refugee caps, granting amnesty to over 600,000 illegal immigrants who fall under Obama's Deferred Action for Childhood Arrivals program (DACA) and putting limits on U.S. immigration and Customs Enforcement agents.

* Rescinding President's Trump's immigration restrictions on 13 countries that help keep us safe from foreign terrorists, and they are eager to begin undoing these and most all of the approximately 400 high-profile immigration policy changes made by the Trump administration.

Then there's the Left's really radical plan - "ABOLISH ICE!" (Immigration & Customs Enforcement) and "comprehensive immigration reform" (code phrase for _amnesty_) to complete the "open borders" nightmare... and that's without considering the national security, election integrity, public health and other quality-of-life issues we will be expected to pay for.
Biden's immigration agenda _represents the most important issue facing the United States_ ...and Judicial Watch is _already ramping up our courtroom strategies of challenging the radical Biden immigration agenda at as many levels as possible_.
So please rest assured, we are _not_ stopping...in fact, if anything _we 're beefing up_.
_We continue to add new resources and double up on others with our eyes firmly fixed on two great_ _principles_ : Support for the rule of law (especially our laws against illegal immigration) and the right of the American people to know what their government is doing.
And that's why I hope **_[you will make your most generous donation to Judicial Watch right now!](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52897&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMTExNjUzNDU=)_**
Your support will help ensure that Judicial Watch's voice and your voice...the voice of law-abiding American citizens...will be heard _loud and clear_ in the debate over immigration, including any effort to grant "amnesty" to illegal aliens!
But, as you know, Judicial Watch doesn't just complain about illegal immigration --

* We sue state and local public officials who violate federal immigration laws by establishing so-called "sanctuary" policies that protect criminal aliens;

* We fight for accurate voter rolls in the courts to protect the integrity of our elections; and

* We force the federal government to reveal documents about bureaucratic efforts to grant amnesty and publicly funded services to illegal aliens through backdoor, "stealth" methods.

I really cannot think of another time in our twenty-seven year history when there has been so urgent a need for Judicial Watch to be at our best...
...because if we're not on the job this year, it simply won't get done.
We are conservative, we are independent, and we are not beholden to political parties.
We are fighting for you and the rule of law, and we _can_ meet our challenges if you **_[stand with us today by making your best tax-deductible donation now](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/wta/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=52897&L=17813&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0xMzUvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249TWF5JnV0bV90ZXJtPU5vbi1Eb25vcnMmdXRtX2NvbnRlbnQ9MjAyMTAyMTExNjUzNDU=)_**. Sincerely,

name: Leah Stokes
subject: "A very good idea, very well explained!"
body:
Democrats can pass a federal clean electricity standard without Republicans' help.
| [](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/379?t=3&akid=6640%2E53494%2EjGMjp6) Friend, It's been just a few days since we dropped our newest policy report with Evergreen and Data for Progress, **["A Roadmap to 100% Clean Electricity by 2035."](https://act.evergreenaction.com/go/2101?t=4&akid=6640%2E53494%2EjGMjp6)** We are thrilled by the enthusiastic responses, from Governor Jay Inslee, environmental stalwarts like the Sierra Club and Sunrise Movement, and climate champions like Senator Ed Markey. Activists and policymakers agree that our roadmap to 100% clean electricity shows how it can be done: _with or without Republican support._ But don't take our word for it. Here's what a few major players in the climate movement have said about our new report:
* **Senator Tina Smith** : "I commend Dr. Stokes and Evergreen for this new report, which outlines how Congress has multiple tools to get this important policy done."
* **Bill McKibben** : "A very good idea, very well explained!"
* **Senator Martin Heinrich** : "Evergreen and Data for Progress have put forward a number of options that Congress should consider as we turn to implementing the full Build Back Better agenda."
* **Tom Steyer** : "A clear and practical roadmap. Great read!"

We're thrilled to see it gaining so much traction already, and we look forward to spreading it far and wide in the coming months. This is just the beginning: We must ensure that Congress acts this year on 100% clean electricity by 2035! Thanks, Professor Leah Stokes

Joe Biden isn’t just pushing his radical left agenda on Americans, he’s in the process of reshaping the very nature of the presidency and the federal government.

In his first two weeks as President, Joe Biden has signed more than twice as many executive orders as President Trump, and even more than Barack Obama in his first month.

Hoosier Republican, these executive orders are far-reaching, from opening our borders to tearing down President Trump’s immensely popular tax bill. From weakening our energy independence to killing thousands of high-wage union jobs.

And they circumvent our country’s entire legislative process! Instead of a bill becoming law by going through the House of Representatives and U.S. Senate, they’re unilaterally implemented by the Biden administration.

| Friends, Some great news! This morning the NH Senate **passed SB 61, New Hampshire's Right-to-Work (RTW) legislation**. Under SB 61, private sector employers would be prevented from requiring any employee to join or pay dues to a labor union as a condition of employment. This is a huge win for our state's economy. Right-to-Work states across the country have seen big increases in manufacturing and wage growth, and have lowered their states' unemployment rates after passage.**Businesses want to move to RTW states and workers are the ones that benefit!** NH Senate Republicans are working hard to make the Granite State the top destination for high paying new jobs - but the fight isn't over! If you want to continue to see us make progress in creating a pro-job growth state government, [please consider making a small $15, $25 or even $100 donation to the NH Senate Republicans here!
